_about: Auth-gated routes (/messages, /items/new, /settings/notifications) are audited by injecting lh-bot's session cookies via scripts/lighthouse-auth.cjs (puppeteerScript). The script reads LH_USER + LH_PASSWORD env vars — set as GitHub Actions secrets in CI — and is a no-op if either is missing, so local LHCI runs against public URLs still work without secrets. /items/<id> is pinned to a stable production listing (the Lorem Ipsum demo); if that listing is deleted, update the URL or rotate to another. See docs/features/2026-05-16_lighthouse-ci-public-routes.md.
